use_cases: Full-screen hero background with animated neon maze pattern
Decorative animated background for tech-focused websites
Loading screen or transitional visual element
ai_summary: An animated canvas-based neon maze component that renders a continuous grid of isometric diamond shapes with cyan-to-magenta gradients and yellow stroke outlines. The shapes pulse and wave using sine-based animation creating a hypnotic neon tunnel effect. Perfect for creating immersive hero sections or decorative animated backgrounds in dark-themed interfaces.
